summary: Backend (13/13 pytest PASS) and Frontend (all SWSA + regression flows PASS) verified for new SWSA Habitat filter. /api/filters returns swsa_habitats with all 10 expected regions. /api/fishes?swsa_habitats=Red%20Sea returns exactly 4 fish; Indo-Pacific returns 64+ (majority); combined Red Sea + colors=yellow works. UI: 'SWSA Habitat' chip group renders below 'Natural Habitat'; selecting Red Sea + Show Results filters list to 4 cards and badge shows 1; Reset clears chips; clear-all works; existing filters/search/detail still work; fish/1 still shows Clown Fish with user-uploaded image.

issues: Console deprecation warning: 'shadow*' style props deprecated - use boxShadow (non-blocking, RN Web only)

action_items: Optional: Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow for RN Web cleanliness
critical_code_review_comments: fish_data._normalize_habitat correctly maps natural_hab to all 10 expected regions; swsa_habitats currently defaults to natural_hab when swsa_hab not provided in RAW_FISH (acceptable per agent_to_agent_context_note)
server.py adds swsa_habitats Query param and uses _match_any with proper case-insensitive matching
Frontend SearchFilters/FilterOptions types extended with swsa_habitats; activeFilterCount memo includes swsa_habitats; FilterSheet renders new group with testIDs filter-swsa_habitats-{region}
All testIDs are present: filter-swsa_habitats-<Region>, reset-filters, apply-filters-btn, open-filters-btn, clear-all-filters
seed_data_creation: None - static fish_data.py dataset (now 92 species; previously 89)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fish dataset grew from 89 -> 92. Use BASE_URL from EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. SWSA chips testIDs: filter-swsa_habitats-{Region} (case sensitive, exact name e.g. 'Red Sea','Indo-Pacific'). Mobile viewport 390x844. Red Sea expected exactly 4 fishes. Indo-Pacific is the majority region. swsa_habitats currently mirrors natural habitat regions because RAW_FISH does not include swsa_hab override key.
